title: Junior Frontend Developer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
